parameters: Everyone rushes away from the elder's house toward

\FX<FC, soft shake>NO NO NO NO!! THIS IS BAD!!\RX

slope. Several houses are crushed almost instantly.
The three of them stop near the center clearing of
the village as debris continues crashing down around
Stay alert! More rocks could still come down!

WHAT IS HAPPENING TO THE MOUNTAIN?!

OF COURSE THEY ARE! WHY WOULDN'T THEY BE HERE TOO?!

children and begins approaching through the mud and
If it corners us here, we're done!
\FX<FC, soft shiver>I REALLY REALLY HATE THIS
Get ready! We have to fight it!

The fight ends with the Elementa forced into its
PHEW... I FEEL LIKE I'M GONNA THROW UP...
Good. That means you're still alive.
We can't stay here. More of them could appear any
You children are not from around here.
No, sir. We're just passing through.
So you are travelers searching for your own.
Everyone knows the stories of Shii.
Some people spend their entire lives searching for
Others never leave home at all.
Do you know where we should go?
People say Shii sometimes appear near the mountain
Yes. Villagers often travel up there.
The road is the part of the mountain without grass.
THAT SOUNDS... WEIRDLY EASY TO FOLLOW.
Too many feet have worn the earth bare over the
Even now, workers still go up the mountain often.
The mountain has been uneasy for days.
If you go, do not remain there longer than
Then you should rest here first before climbing
